headline: RADIUS GLOBAL INFRASTRUCTURE, INC. APPOINTS JULIAN PLUMSTEAD AS CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER
summary: https://www.radiusglobal.com Radius Global Infrastructure, Inc. has announced the appointment of Julian Plumstead as Chief Executive Officer. Mr. Plumstead succeeds retiring CEO Scott G. Bruce, who will remain with Radius Global Infrastructure, Inc. as a senior advisor.

headline: American Tower shares are trading lower after Amazon announced plans to purchase satellite operator Globalstar and provide connectivity for Apple devices, which may reduce demand for terrestrial communications infrastructure providers.

headline: 2 New REIT Buyout Targets
summary: Private equity is circling REITs as discounts to asset value remain unusually wide. Read why SBAC and UNIT stocks stand out as especially likely takeover candidates.
